stories.title: Copy of Sources: Clips nearing Kawhi deal with Raptors
stories.summary: The LA Clippers are nearing a deal to send Kawhi Leonard to the Toronto Raptors for Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, two first-round picks, one pick swap and two second-rounders, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

stories.title: Copy of Toronto goes all in for Kawhi Leonard: Grading the...
stories.summary: Can Toronto make a run in the East with Kawhi Leonard? Will LA make more moves?

stories.title: LeBron tells Lakers he plans to play elsewhere
stories.summary: James has informed the Lakers that the franchise can move on without him because he will play elsewhere, Klutch Sports CEO Rich Paul told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

stories.title: Haaland scores as Norway knock out Ivory Coast
stories.summary: Erling Haaland sent Norway into a round-of-16 clash with Brazil by scoring an 86th-minute winner against Ivory Coast in Dallas.

stories.title: SCOTUS upholds bans on transgender athletes
stories.summary: The Supreme Court on Tuesday issued a decision to uphold state laws barring transgender girls and women from playing on school athletic teams.
